response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience, including geospatial projects (GISCollective) and performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency apps with DLang), but his background heavily emphasizes web/mobile development and scripting languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js) rather than the required C++/Rust and distributed systems expertise. His work in routing/navigation is indirect and lacks evidence of optimizing large-scale geospatial data pipelines.
strengths: Proven geospatial project (GISCollective) demonstrating familiarity with mapping/data platforms
Strong background in performance optimization (low-latency apps, caching, async I/O)
Experience with distributed systems concepts (microservices, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++/Rust or routing/navigation systems (primary tech stack mismatch)
No clear evidence of optimizing large-scale data pipelines for freshness/latency in geospatial routing
Indirect or dated experience with embedded/C++ systems (National Instruments C/C++ in 2014-2015)
